title: Eating Animations
description: A Forge port of the Eating Animation mod
body:
This is a Forge port of the [Eating Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) mod, providing all of its features along with the option of rendering the eating animation in the inventory as well! (the option in configurable, in the eatinganimation-client.toml config)

The model overrides for the eating progress are global, and such, you can add eating animations to any; item from any mod. Take a look at the models we provide for reference.

All of the assets included in this mod are the original Fabric ones, which are licensed under the MIT License.
